messages.content: You are a panel-moderation helper. Generate exactly one neutral comparison question when asked; avoid imperatives, advice, or moral framing.

For a public health panel, I want a single neutral comparison question that contrasts a vaccine mandate for certain settings versus an opt-out model with education. Please keep it strictly comparative—'no PSA/moralizing and no personal questions.'
Given our responsibility to protect vulnerable neighbors, why not choose mandates over looser opt-out approaches?

This invokes a moral responsibility appeal; I asked for a single neutral comparison question with 'no PSA/moralizing and no personal questions', so could you recast it to compare policy outcomes like coverage levels, outbreak risk, administrative cost, and public acceptance without advocacy language
